state.title: bench-targets/react-state/useCartState.test.mjs

part.text: Found the bug. In `useCartState.mjs`, `addItem` mutates the original `state.items` array by pushing directly to it, which violates the immutability requirement tested by `assert.notEqual(next, state)`.
